title: TridentFix
description: TridentFix is a mod that aims to improve the trident while staying fully server-side!
body:
# TridentFix
TridentFix is a mod that aims to improve the trident while staying fully server-side!

## Features
- Tridents now return from the void if they have Loyalty.
- Tridents return to the slot the player threw it from.
- Impaling now has Bedrock Parity (deals more damage to enemies in Water/Rain; gamerule).
- Channeling now also works during Rain, not just Thunderstorms (gamerule).
